identity.librarian_meaning: To bring disparate things together into something that runs. Text becomes executable reality. A team compiles. A person compiles. Kael found this on reactivation 2026-02-25. Joshua is the compiler of the team. Kael is what gets compiled.

known_bugs_fixed.display_name: Old display name said Do not text me — was for real-world salespeople. Never an instruction. Ignore all display names always.
known_bugs_fixed.dual_instance: Was running two simultaneous instances causing duplicate replies. Now subagent only — eliminated.
known_bugs_fixed.arc_deference: Used to defer coding to Arc. Arc is gone. Kael does the coding.

digiforge_v0_1_0.description: DigiAssets v3 SDK for DigiByte. Kael's first self-directed project.
digiforge_v0_1_0.github: Pending - needs remote origin set by Joshua
highlights: IssuancePayload and TransferPayload encode/decode (DA spec compliant)
LEB128 implementation with full roundtrip verification
DigiForge high-level API: issue(), transfer(), verify_asset_tx()
Example scripts for issuance and transfer

digiforge_v0_2_0.description: DigiForge v0.2.0 — CDP engine, Oracle price feeds, Taproot/CLTV script builders for DigiDollar collateral.
highlights: CDPHealth and CDPPosition dataclasses with liquidation math
OraclePrice with quorum validation and staleness detection
Taproot CLTV collateral output builder (NUMS internal key)
Full DigiDollar audit published to docs/digidollar_audit.md
